acceptance: ddx install helix fetches and installs HELIX. ddx search returns results from registry. .ddx/lock.yaml tracks installed packages with commit SHA and tree hash. ddx verify checks integrity.
description: Replace git subtree sync with lightweight package install. ddx install/search/uninstall fetching from configurable registries. Commit SHA pinning + tree hash in .ddx/lock.yaml.
title: Implement library registry with package install (FEAT-009)

acceptance: No harness name checks in runner.go. TokenPattern and EffortFormat on Harness struct.
description: runner.go:103 has if harnessName==codex. extractTokens has switch on harness name. Breaks data-driven pattern.
title: Move token patterns and effort format to Harness struct

acceptance: Tests verify exact arg arrays for codex, claude, gemini with all flag combos (model, workdir, effort, prompt via arg and stdin).
description: No test verifies the exact args built for codex/claude/gemini given model, workdir, effort, prompt. Core logic untested.
title: Add arg construction tests for all harnesses

description: types.go:81 defines DefaultAutomation=auto but nothing references it.
title: Remove dead DefaultAutomation constant

acceptance: ddx doc migrate converts all dun: frontmatter to ddx: preserving all fields. Round-trip test passes.
description: One-time tool: ddx doc migrate converts dun: frontmatter blocks to ddx: in all markdown files in a directory tree.
title: Migration tool: convert dun: frontmatter to ddx:

acceptance: Run() calls resolveOpts(), buildArgs(), execute(), processResult(). Each method <30 lines.
description: Run() does 8 things: resolve, validate, build args, execute, time, error handle, extract tokens, log. Too many responsibilities.
title: Decompose runner.Run() into smaller methods

acceptance: Runner.Run() uses injected Executor. No direct exec.CommandContext calls in runner.go. Mock executor used in tests.
description: F-001: runner.Run() directly calls exec.CommandContext. Extract Executor interface (Execute ctx,binary,args,stdin -> stdout,stderr,exitCode,error). Inject real in prod, mock in tests.
title: Extract Executor interface from runner.Run() for testability

acceptance: ddx doc stale detects stale docs. ddx doc stamp updates review hashes. ddx doc graph shows dependency tree. Reads dun: frontmatter for backward compat. All tests pass.
description: Port doc_dag, frontmatter, hash, stamp from dun to ddx. Read both ddx: and dun: frontmatter, write ddx:. CLI: ddx doc graph/stale/stamp/show/deps/dependents/validate.
title: Implement document dependency graph (FEAT-007)

acceptance: ddx agent run uses default harness and model overrides from .ddx/config.yaml when no CLI flags are provided.
description: agentRunner() in agent_cmd.go ignores .ddx/config.yaml. Should load agent.harness, agent.models, agent.timeout_ms, agent.session_log_dir from project config.
title: Wire agent config loading from .ddx/config.yaml

acceptance: agent log reads session_log_dir from runner config, not hardcoded default.
description: agent_cmd.go:248 hardcodes agent.DefaultLogDir. Ignores project config session_log_dir.
title: Fix agent log command to use runner config for session_log_dir

acceptance: docs/helix/02-design/architecture.md exists with ddx: frontmatter, describes system structure, component interactions, data flow, and deployment topology.
description: No architecture doc describes how CLI, server, doc graph engine, bead storage, and agent dispatch compose. Feature specs describe individual capabilities but nothing ties them together.
title: Create architecture document

acceptance: TestIntegration_Codex and TestIntegration_Claude send trivial prompts and verify non-empty output. Skipped when binary not on PATH.
description: No test calls a real harness. Arg construction bugs ship undetected.
title: Add integration tests against real harnesses

acceptance: Web UI served at / from ddx-server. Document browser lists and renders docs. Bead board shows status/deps. Dependency graph renders visually. Agent log shows sessions.
description: Vite + React + Tailwind SPA embedded in ddx-server via Go embed.FS. Document browser, dependency graph visualization, bead board, agent log monitor.
title: Build web UI with embedded SPA (FEAT-008)

acceptance: ddx-server starts on localhost, serves /api/documents, /api/beads, /api/docs/graph, /api/docs/stale. MCP tools ddx_list_documents, ddx_read_document, ddx_list_beads, ddx_bead_ready work.
description: Go web server (Chi or net/http) serving documents, beads, doc graph, and agent session logs over HTTP REST and MCP (Streamable HTTP via mcp-go). Single binary.
title: Implement DDx server with HTTP API and MCP endpoints (FEAT-002)
